bns:Component.name: HROpsConsole - Get Audit Log
bns:Component.bns:description: Returns audit log entries for compliance tracking and HR activity history

message.msgTxt: '{"auditLog":[{"id":"AL001","ts":"2024-03-01T14:32:00","actor":"Sarah Reynolds","action":"Case Created","entity":"C-2024-005","detail":"Payroll exception case opened for E015."},{"id":"AL002","ts":"2024-03-01T14:30:00","actor":"System","action":"Integration Sync","entity":"Workday HRIS","detail":"Sync completed. 2 errors detected."},{"id":"AL003","ts":"2024-03-01T14:00:00","actor":"System","action":"Payroll Exception Alert","entity":"ADP Payroll","detail":"E015 payroll record active post-termination."},{"id":"AL004","ts":"2024-03-01T10:15:00","actor":"Amanda Foster","action":"Notification Sent","entity":"E002","detail":"Overdue training reminder sent to Priya Patel and manager."},{"id":"AL005","ts":"2024-03-01T09:00:00","actor":"System","action":"Integration Sync","entity":"ADP Payroll","detail":"Sync completed. 4 errors detected."},{"id":"AL006","ts":"2024-02-28T17:00:00","actor":"Jordan Williams","action":"Grievance Filed","entity":"C-2024-003","detail":"Pay discrepancy formal grievance submitted."},{"id":"AL007","ts":"2024-02-28T16:00:00","actor":"System","action":"Employee Terminated","entity":"E015","detail":"Omar Hassan status changed to Terminated."},{"id":"AL008","ts":"2024-02-25T14:00:00","actor":"Amanda Foster","action":"Case Closed","entity":"C-2024-007","detail":"Expense policy case closed. Verbal warning documented."},{"id":"AL009","ts":"2024-02-20T11:00:00","actor":"System","action":"Compliance Alert","entity":"COMP-001","detail":"Priya Patel Harassment Prevention training overdue."},{"id":"AL010","ts":"2024-02-14T09:30:00","actor":"Amanda Foster","action":"FMLA Approved","entity":"C-2024-002","detail":"FMLA extension approved for Carlos Martinez through March 30."}]}'
